div1.entryFree: Uplift, to lift, to raise: your swords are now too massy . . . and will not be --ed, Tp. III, 3, 68. with --ed arms, R2 II, 2, 50. hands --ed in my right, Mcb. IV, 3, 42. slaves . . . shall u. us to the view, Ant. V, 2, 211. your low-laid son our godhead will u. Cymb. V, 4, 103. Metaphorically == to exalt, to elevate with joy: how were I then --ed! Troil. III, 2, 175.
